select.name: business_impact_score
select.expr: CASE WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Highly Efficient' THEN 100 WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Efficient' THEN 85 WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Moderate' THEN 70 ELSE 50 END
select.description: Business impact score based on cost efficiency (0-100)

select.name: strategic_recommendation
select.expr: CASE WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Highly Efficient' THEN 'Promote & Expand' WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Efficient' THEN 'Monitor Performance' WHEN mart__products__reporting__cost_efficiency.cost_efficiency_category = 'Moderate' THEN 'Optimize Costs' ELSE 'Review Strategy' END
